title: License Renewal Planning · 跨 Org
subtitle: 規劃 license 續約優先序 · 偵測 overdue / 即將到期 / 仍 active
compute_fns: (() => { const cf = window.computeFns; const flatten = data => (data.topology?.orgs || []).flatMap(o => (o.devices || []).map(d => ({...d, org_name: o.org_name}))); const isExpired = d => d.license_status === 'expired' || (d.expired_date && d.expired_date < Date.now()); const daysFromNow = ms => ms ? Math.round((ms - Date.now()) / 86400000) : null; cf.renewal_summary = (data) => { const all = flatten(data); const expired = all.filter(isExpired); const oldest = expired.sort((a,b) => (a.expired_date||0) - (b.expired_date||0))[0]; if (!oldest) return '所有 license 都還在有效期。'; const days = Math.abs(daysFromNow(oldest.expired_date)); return `${expired.length} / ${all.length} 個設備 license 已過期；最久 overdue：${oldest.name} (${days} 天前到期)。建議優先採購 ${expired.length} 張續約 license。`; }; cf.lic_total = (data) => flatten(data).length; cf.lic_overdue = (data) => flatten(data).filter(isExpired).length; cf.lic_overdue_subtext = (data) => { const all = flatten(data); const exp = all.filter(isExpired).length; return `${(exp/Math.max(1,all.length)*100).toFixed(0)}% of fleet`; }; cf.lic_expiring_soon = (data) => flatten(data).filter(d => { const dd = daysFromNow(d.expired_date); return dd !== null && dd >= 0 && dd <= 90; }).length; cf.lic_active = (data) => flatten(data).filter(d => !isExpired(d) && d.license_status === 'active').length; cf.lic_active_subtext = (data) => { const acts = flatten(data).filter(d => !isExpired(d)); if (acts.length === 0) return 'none'; const next = acts.sort((a,b) => (a.expired_date||0) - (b.expired_date||0))[0]; const dd = daysFromNow(next.expired_date); return `next expires in ${dd}d`; }; cf.licenses_for_timeline = (data) => flatten(data).map(d => ({label: d.name, date_ms: d.expired_date, severity: null /* auto by date */, sub: d.org_name})); cf.overdue_by_org_bars = (data) => { const all = flatten(data); const by = {}; all.filter(isExpired).forEach(d => { by[d.org_name] = (by[d.org_name] || 0) + 1; }); return Object.entries(by).map(([org, count]) => ({label: org, value: count, color: 'crit'})); }; cf.all_licenses_table = (data) => flatten(data).map(d => ({ ...d, days_from_now: daysFromNow(d.expired_date), urgency: isExpired(d) ? 'overdue' : ((daysFromNow(d.expired_date) || 9999) <= 90 ? 'expiring_soon' : 'active') })); cf.fleet_total = (data) => flatten(data).length; cf.never_expired_devices = (data) => flatten(data).filter(d => !d.expired_date).map(d => ({label: d.name})); })();

sections.title: License Renewal Plan · 完整設備清單

en.title: License Renewal Planning · Cross-Org
en.subtitle: Plan renewal priority · detect overdue / expiring-soon / still-active
en.compute_fns: (() => { const cf = window.computeFns; const flat = data => (data.topology?.orgs || []).flatMap(o => (o.devices || []).map(d => ({...d, org_name: o.org_name}))); const isExp = d => d.license_status === 'expired' || (d.expired_date && d.expired_date < Date.now()); const dfn = ms => ms ? Math.round((ms - Date.now()) / 86400000) : null; cf.renewal_summary = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExp); const oldest = exp.sort((a,b) => (a.expired_date||0) - (b.expired_date||0))[0]; if (!oldest) return 'All licenses are within validity period.'; const days = Math.abs(dfn(oldest.expired_date)); return `${exp.length} of ${all.length} device licenses are expired. Most overdue: ${oldest.name} (${days} days past expiry). Recommend purchasing ${exp.length} renewal licenses as priority.`; }; cf.lic_total = (data) => flat(data).length; cf.lic_overdue = (data) => flat(data).filter(isExp).length; cf.lic_overdue_subtext = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExp).length; return `${(exp/Math.max(1,all.length)*100).toFixed(0)}% of fleet`; }; cf.lic_expiring_soon = (data) => flat(data).filter(d => { const dd = dfn(d.expired_date); return dd !== null && dd >= 0 && dd <= 90; }).length; cf.lic_active = (data) => flat(data).filter(d => !isExp(d) && d.license_status === 'active').length; cf.lic_active_subtext = (data) => { const acts = flat(data).filter(d => !isExp(d)); if (acts.length === 0) return 'none'; const next = acts.sort((a,b) => (a.expired_date||0) - (b.expired_date||0))[0]; const dd = dfn(next.expired_date); return `next expires in ${dd}d`; }; cf.licenses_for_timeline = (data) => flat(data).map(d => ({label: d.name, date_ms: d.expired_date, severity: null, sub: d.org_name})); cf.overdue_by_org_bars = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const by = {}; all.filter(isExp).forEach(d => { by[d.org_name] = (by[d.org_name] || 0) + 1; }); return Object.entries(by).map(([org, count]) => ({label: org, value: count, color: 'crit'})); }; cf.fleet_total = (data) => flat(data).length; })();

ja.title: ライセンス更新計画 · 全 Org
ja.subtitle: 更新優先順位の計画 · 期限切れ / 期限間近 / 有効を検出
ja.compute_fns: (() => { const cf = window.computeFns; const flat = data => (data.topology?.orgs || []).flatMap(o => (o.devices || []).map(d => ({...d, org_name: o.org_name}))); const isExp = d => d.license_status === 'expired' || (d.expired_date && d.expired_date < Date.now()); const dfn = ms => ms ? Math.round((ms - Date.now()) / 86400000) : null; cf.renewal_summary = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExp); const oldest = exp.sort((a,b) => (a.expired_date||0) - (b.expired_date||0))[0]; if (!oldest) return '全ライセンスが有効期限内です。'; const days = Math.abs(dfn(oldest.expired_date)); return `デバイス ${all.length} 台のうち ${exp.length} 台のライセンスが期限切れ。最も古い：${oldest.name}（${days} 日前に期限切れ）。優先的に ${exp.length} 件の更新ライセンスの購入を推奨。`; }; cf.lic_total = (data) => flat(data).length; cf.lic_overdue = (data) => flat(data).filter(isExp).length; cf.lic_overdue_subtext = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const exp = all.filter(isExp).length; return `フリート全体の ${(exp/Math.max(1,all.length)*100).toFixed(0)}%`; }; cf.lic_expiring_soon = (data) => flat(data).filter(d => { const dd = dfn(d.expired_date); return dd !== null && dd >= 0 && dd <= 90; }).length; cf.lic_active = (data) => flat(data).filter(d => !isExp(d) && d.license_status === 'active').length; cf.lic_active_subtext = (data) => { const acts = flat(data).filter(d => !isExp(d)); if (acts.length === 0) return 'なし'; const next = acts.sort((a,b) => (a.expired_date||0) - (b.expired_date||0))[0]; const dd = dfn(next.expired_date); return `次の期限まで ${dd} 日`; }; cf.licenses_for_timeline = (data) => flat(data).map(d => ({label: d.name, date_ms: d.expired_date, severity: null, sub: d.org_name})); cf.overdue_by_org_bars = (data) => { const all = flat(data); const by = {}; all.filter(isExp).forEach(d => { by[d.org_name] = (by[d.org_name] || 0) + 1; }); return Object.entries(by).map(([org, count]) => ({label: org, value: count, color: 'crit'})); }; cf.fleet_total = (data) => flat(data).length; })();
